summary: Excellent matrix recording of a super‑fun, groove‑heavy show highlighted by stellar Crazy Fingers and Cosmic Charlie performances
review: All three reviewers rave about the high‑quality matrix source – board‑heavy with crystal‑clear highs and even speed‑correction – making the sound treatment sound superb. The concert itself is described as tight, funky and incredibly enjoyable, with Crazy Fingers and a surprisingly strong Cosmic Charlie standing out.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star comments on both performance and recording quality; reviewers call it one of the best matrix mixes, indicating an exceptional show with excellent audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Board‑heavy matrix with clean high end, speed‑corrected to fix pitch issues; crowd ambience is well balanced and the overall sound treatment is praised as beautiful.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A tight, funky, groove‑laden performance that keeps the crowd hyped; the matrix mix enhances the live energy throughout.
